title: Traditional German Borscht with Ukrainian Twist
description: A hearty and flavorful beet-based soup with a hint of Ukrainian spices, inspired by traditional German cuisine.
instructions: Peel and chop the beets, carrots, and onion.
In a large pot, combine the chopped vegetables, floral water, and Ukrainian sausage.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
Add cure salt and stir to combine.
Let the soup cool, then refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
Stir in fresh dill and serve chilled, topped with a dollop of sour cream.
Serve hot or cold, garnished with additional fresh dill if desired.
